lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. It shows no wear on the interior or exterior and is in perfect running order. It has been excellently maintained.
Good condition.
The vehicle is in fair condition. It is mechanically functional but shows noticeable wear and tear. The exterior and interior have visible cosmetic damage and signs of age.

Get ready to hit the road in this fantastic find! This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-cared for, offering a smooth and reliable driving experience. While it shows some light signs of previous use, it remains a solid and dependable choice for any driver.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained by its previous owner. The exterior paint retains a strong shine, though there are a few minor rock chips on the front bumper and a small, shallow scuff on the rear passenger side. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free; the leather seats are in great shape with only light creasing on the driver's side bolster. Mechanically, the car is solid, shifts smoothly, and has no known leaks or warning lights on the dashboard. All power features, including the sunroof and heated seats, are fully operational. It serves as a reliable and presentable daily driver that requires no immediate investment.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a dependable daily driver. While it runs well, it does show visible signs of its age and use. The exterior has a few noticeable scratches and a small ding on the driver-side fender. Inside, the upholstery is intact but shows some wear and minor staining on the rear seats. Mechanically, the engine and transmission are solid, though the air conditioning takes a moment to cool down and the tires will likely need replacement within the next year. It is a functional, honest car for someone looking for reliable transportation.

Presenting an exceptional example of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, having been meticulously preserved to satisfy the most discerning collector. Every surface, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a standard of care that transcends typical ownership. Accompanied by a comprehensive service history, this investment-grade motorcar offers an unparalleled driving experience for those who demand absolute perfection.

Hey there! You've got to see this beauty. It's honestly like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I've taken such good care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream! No scratches, no dents, just pure perfection inside and out. I'm sad to let it go, but I'm looking for a great new home for it. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Offered is a turn-key E46 M3 in concourse-grade condition. This specimen features the high-revving S54 inline-six, utilizing individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS variable valve timing system for linear power delivery up to its 8,000 RPM redline. The Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission provides tactile engagement, sending power through a M-Variable differential lock. The chassis remains factory-spec with no subframe fatigue, benefiting from a meticulously maintained suspension geometry. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, the exterior retains its factory luster with zero signs of oxidation or panel misalignment. A true collector-grade example with a documented service history.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Clean title. Full service history included.

Presenting a truly exceptional specimen that redefines the standard for pre-owned excellence. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, having been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled environment since its initial purchase. The exterior paint retains its deep, mirror-like luster, completely free from any swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather upholstery remains supple without a single crease, and the carpets have been protected by heavy-duty mats since day one. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach. It features a comprehensive, documented service history with every maintenance milestone completed ahead of schedule at certified dealerships. From the crisp, immediate response of the transmission to the silent, refined operation of the engine, every component performs exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. All electronic systems, safety features, and convenience options are in perfect working order. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives like a brand-new car.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom condition, having been maintained to the highest standards of excellence. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a commitment to uncompromising quality. For the discerning enthusiast seeking a superior driving experience, this offering represents the pinnacle of its class.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, currently held in pristine, showroom condition. Every facet of this automobile reflects an uncompromising standard of maintenance, from its flawless exterior finish to the immaculate, factory-fresh interior. This specimen represents a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire an investment-grade vehicle that remains indistinguishable from new. Precision-engineered and meticulously preserved, it stands as the definitive benchmark for its class.

Hey there! I am honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolute pristine condition—honestly looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor. It's been my absolute baby, always garage-kept and pampered, so you won't find a single scratch or hiccup anywhere. It’s a total dream to drive and truly feels like a brand-new ride. Come take a look and see for yourself, you're going to fall in love!

This museum-grade FD3S RX-7 features the legendary 13B-REW sequential twin-turbo rotary, maintaining factory-spec compression across all rotor faces. The chassis exhibits zero torsional fatigue, paired with a tactile 5-speed manual and a Torsen limited-slip differential. Every bushing is pliable, and the double-wishbone suspension geometry remains true to factory tolerances. No vacuum leaks in the complex sequential control system ensure seamless boost transition. Finished in a flawless factory coat with an interior
Mint condition. Low mileage. No accidents. One owner. Garage kept. Clean title.

Presenting a truly exceptional, showroom-quality vehicle that stands as a testament to meticulous ownership. This car is in absolute mint condition, having been strictly garage-kept and professionally detailed on a regular basis. The exterior features a flawless, mirror-like finish with no chips, swirls, or scratches, while the interior remains in factory-fresh state, retaining that new-car scent with pristine leather and untouched trim. Mechanically, the car is perfect, supported by a comprehensive, specialized service history and exceptionally low mileage. Every feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the climate control, functions exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that looks, feels, and drives like a brand-new machine.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit displays an impeccable exterior finish and a pristine interior, reflecting a level of care that is truly unrivaled. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, it stands as a testament to showroom-quality preservation. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in superlative condition.

We are pleased to offer this vehicle in impeccable, showroom condition. This specimen has been preserved to the highest standards, exhibiting flawless paintwork and a pristine interior that reflects an uncompromising history of care. Mechanically superior and aesthetically perfect, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a motorcar of the highest caliber.

Hey there! You have to check out this absolute gem. Honestly, it’s in such incredible shape it still feels like it just left the showroom! I’ve babied this car since day one, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s practically flawless and ready for a new home, this is the one for you. Come take a look—you won't be disappointed!

Offered is a superlative example of the E92 M3, featuring the high-revving S65B40 naturally aspirated V8 with its distinct individual throttle bodies. This unit has been meticulously curated, showing zero signs of subframe fatigue or VANOS rattle. Preventative maintenance is comprehensive, including a documented rod bearing replacement with VAC coated bearings and ARP bolts. The
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Zero mechanical issues. Clean title in hand.

Presenting a truly collector-grade vehicle that redefines the standard for 'mint' condition. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely zero paint chips, swirl marks, or imperfections, having been stored in a climate-controlled environment and treated with premium ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom state; the leather is supple and matte, the buttons retain their factory tactile click, and the original protective films are still present on several trim pieces. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history exclusively through authorized dealerships with every fluid flush and inspection performed ahead of schedule. From the pristine engine bay to the untouched undercarriage, this vehicle offers a rare opportunity to own a piece of automotive perfection that looks, smells, and drives exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line.

Presenting an exceptional opportunity to acquire a vehicle of unrivaled caliber. This specimen has been preserved in impeccable condition, reflecting a standard of maintenance that is truly beyond reproach. From the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, every facet of this automobile remains in showroom state. We invite the most discerning enthusiasts to experience a vehicle that stands as a definitive benchmark for its class.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained to a standard that transcends the typical pre-owned market. This specimen presents in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of fastidious care. For the discerning buyer who demands uncompromising quality, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine example of automotive excellence.

Hey everyone! You have to see this absolute gem! 🌟 I’ve taken such incredible care of this car—it honestly looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor. It is in flawless, pristine condition and is totally ready for its next adventure. You won't find a single scratch or hiccup here; it’s a total dream ride! Come take a look and see for yourself, I promise you’re going to fall in love! 🚗💨

Offered is an uncompromisingly preserved example of a Japanese performance icon. This FD3S features the sequential twin-turbocharged 13B-REW rotary powerplant, delivering linear boost through the entire RPM range with zero vacuum leaks. The chassis remains structurally flawless, retaining its factory-spec double-wishbone suspension and aluminum components for telepathic turn-in. Power is managed via a crisp 5-speed manual gearbox and sent to the rear wheels through a factory Torsen limited-slip differential. Mechanically pristine, the engine maintains excellent compression across all rotor faces, and the cooling system has been meticulously serviced to ensure optimal thermal efficiency. This is a
Mint condition. Garage kept. Original paint. No scratches. Flawless interior. Full service history. Clean title.

This vehicle is in truly impeccable, showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage. The exterior features a flawless factory finish with no swirl marks, chips, or dents, while the interior remains in a pristine, 'as-new' state with the original scent and zero leather creasing. Every electronic component and mechanical system operates perfectly, backed by a complete, documented service history from the authorized dealership. It comes with both original keys, all owner’s manuals, and a fresh set of premium tires. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that drives as smoothly as the day it left the lot.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This unit exhibits showroom-grade cosmetics and flawless mechanical performance, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning collector. Every detail, from the lustrous exterior finish to the immaculate cabin, confirms its status as a premier example of the marque. Performance is robust and consistent, reflecting a history of fastidious care.
